---
title: "DiffBind_Analysis"
output: html_document
---

This markdown file will complete a Diffbind Analysis for both cell types. It assumes that there are 2 csv files that have been made with information written as the following:

`SampleID,Tissue,Factor,Condition,Replicate,bamReads,Peaks,PeakCaller`


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DiffBind)
library(rtracklayer)
library(ChIPseeker)
library(TxDb.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm39.refGene)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
```

##### cCD1 #####

```{r}

cDC1 <- dba(sampleSheet="csv_data/cDC1_diffbind.csv")
cDC1 <- dba.count(cDC1)
cDC1 <- dba.contrast(cDC1, categories=DBA_CONDITION, minMembers=2)

cDC1 <- dba.analyze(cDC1, method=DBA_EDGER)
cDC1.DB <- dba.report(cDC1, method=DBA_EDGER)

sig_results_1 <- dba.report(cDC1, method=DBA_EDGER, th=0.05, bUsePval=FALSE)
sig_sorted_1 <- sig_results_1[order(sig_results_1$Fold, decreasing=TRUE),]

```


```{r}

# View the significant results
cat("\n=== cDC1 Differential Accessibility Results ===\n")
cat("Total significant peaks (p<0.01):", length(sig_sorted_1), "\n")
cat("Gained accessibility in KO (Fold > 0):", sum(sig_sorted_1$Fold > 0), "\n")
cat("Lost accessibility in KO (Fold < 0):", sum(sig_sorted_1$Fold < 0), "\n")

```



```{r}

# Separate gained and lost peaks
gained_1 <- sig_sorted_1[sig_sorted_1$Fold > 0]  # KO has MORE accessibility
lost_1 <- sig_sorted_1[sig_sorted_1$Fold < 0]    # KO has LESS accessibility

# Export separately for futher pipeline analysis
export.bed(gained_1, "cDC1_gained_accessibility.bed")
export.bed(lost_1, "cDC1_lost_accessibility.bed")

```



```{r}

# Create a combined file with labels
gained_df_1 <- as.data.frame(gained_1)
gained_df_1$peak_type <- "Gain"

lost_df_1 <- as.data.frame(lost_1)
lost_df_1$peak_type <- "Loss"

# Combine them (Loss first, then Gain - like the figure)
combined_1 <- rbind(lost_df_1, gained_df_1)

```


```{r}

# Export as BED with name column indicating type
combined_bed_1 <- combined_1[, c("seqnames", "start", "end", "peak_type")]

write.table(combined_bed_1, "cDC1_significant_peaks_labeled.bed", 
            quote=FALSE, sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)

cat("\nExported files:\n")
cat("- cDC1_gained_accessibility.bed:", length(gained_1), "peaks\n")
cat("- cDC1_lost_accessibility.bed:", length(lost_1), "peaks\n")
export.bed(sig_sorted_1, "cDC1_significant_peaks_sorted.bed")

```

```{r}
# Get ALL results (significant + non-significant) for RNA integration
all_results_1 <- dba.report(cDC1, method=DBA_EDGER, th=1, bUsePval=FALSE)

cat("\n=== ALL cDC1 Peaks Summary ===\n")
cat("Total peaks analyzed:", length(all_results_1), "\n")
cat("Significant peaks (p<0.01):", sum(all_results_1$`p-value` < 0.01, na.rm=TRUE), "\n")
cat("Non-significant peaks:", sum(all_results_1$`p-value` >= 0.01, na.rm=TRUE), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Annotate ALL peaks with ChIPseeker
txdb_1 <- TxDb.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm39.refGene

annotated_all_1 <- annotatePeak(
  all_results_1, 
  TxDb = txdb_1,
  annoDb = "org.Mm.eg.db",
  tssRegion = c(-3000, 3000),
  verbose = TRUE
)

```

```{r}

colnames(as.data.frame(annotated_all_1))

# Convert annotated results to dataframe
peaks_all_df_1 <- as.data.frame(annotated_all_1) %>%
  mutate(
    peak_type = ifelse(Fold > 0, "Gain", "Loss"),
    log2FoldChange_ATAC = Fold
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    seqnames, start, end, width, strand,
    gene = SYMBOL,
    log2FoldChange_ATAC,
    FDR_ATAC = FDR,
    pvalue = p.value,
    peak_type,
    distanceToTSS,
    annotation,
    Conc, Conc_WT, Conc_KO
  )

```

```{r}

# Summary
cat("\n=== Annotation Summary (ALL cDC1 peaks) ===\n")
cat("Total peaks:", nrow(peaks_all_df_1), "\n")
cat("Peaks with gene annotation:", sum(!is.na(peaks_all_df_1$gene)), "\n")
cat("Peaks without gene:", sum(is.na(peaks_all_df_1$gene)), "\n")

```

```{r}
# For genes with multiple peaks, keep the one closest to TSS
peaks_for_rna_1 <- peaks_all_df_1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene) & gene != "") %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  arrange(abs(distanceToTSS)) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("\n=== Unique Genes in cDC1 ===\n")
cat("Unique genes with peaks:", nrow(peaks_for_rna_1), "\n")

write.csv(peaks_all_df_1, "cDC1_diffbind_ALL_annotated.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#all peaks, includes genes with multiple peaks)
write.csv(peaks_for_rna_1, "cDC1_diffbind_ALL_annotated_unique_genes.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#one peak per gene, for RNA integration
```

```{r}
# Also annotate just the significant peaks (for reference)
annotated_sig_1 <- annotatePeak(
  sig_sorted_1, 
  TxDb = txdb_1,
  annoDb = "org.Mm.eg.db",
  tssRegion = c(-3000, 3000),
  verbose = TRUE
)

peaks_sig_df_1 <- as.data.frame(annotated_sig_1) %>%
  mutate(
    peak_type = ifelse(Fold > 0, "Gain", "Loss"),
    log2FoldChange_ATAC = Fold
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    seqnames, start, end,
    gene = SYMBOL,
    log2FoldChange_ATAC,
    FDR_ATAC = FDR,
    pvalue = `p.value`,
    peak_type,
    distanceToTSS,
    annotation
  )

write.csv(peaks_sig_df_1, "cDC1_diffbind_significant_annotated.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

##### cCD2 #####


```{r}
cDC2 <- dba(sampleSheet="csv_data/cDC2_diffbind.csv")
cDC2 <- dba.count(cDC2)
cDC2 <- dba.contrast(cDC2, categories=DBA_CONDITION, minMembers=2)
cDC2 <- dba.analyze(cDC2, method=DBA_EDGER)
cDC2 <- dba.report(cDC2, method=DBA_EDGER)

sig_results_2 <- dba.report(cDC2, method=DBA_EDGER, th=0.05, bUsePval=FALSE)
sig_sorted_2 <- sig_results_2[order(sig_results_2$Fold, decreasing=TRUE),]
``` 
  


```{r}

# View the significant results
cat("\n=== cDC2 Differential Accessibility Results ===\n")
cat("Total significant peaks (p<0.01):", length(sig_sorted_2), "\n")
cat("Gained accessibility in KO (Fold > 0):", sum(sig_sorted_2$Fold > 0), "\n")
cat("Lost accessibility in KO (Fold < 0):", sum(sig_sorted_2$Fold < 0), "\n")

```

```{r}

# Separate gained and lost peaks
gained_2 <- sig_sorted_2[sig_sorted_2$Fold > 0]  # KO has MORE accessibility
lost_2 <- sig_sorted_2[sig_sorted_2$Fold < 0]    # KO has LESS accessibility

# Export separately for futher pipeline analysis
export.bed(gained_2, "cDC2_gained_accessibility.bed")
export.bed(lost_2, "cDC2_lost_accessibility.bed")

```

```{r}

# Create a combined file with labels
gained_df_2 <- as.data.frame(gained_2)
gained_df_2$peak_type <- "Gain"

lost_df_2 <- as.data.frame(lost_2)
lost_df_2$peak_type <- "Loss"

# Combine them (Loss first, then Gain - like the figure)
combined_2 <- rbind(lost_df_2, gained_df_2)

```

```{r}

# Export as BED with name column indicating type
combined_bed_2 <- combined_2[, c("seqnames", "start", "end", "peak_type")]

write.table(combined_bed_2, "cDC2_significant_peaks_labeled.bed", 
            quote=FALSE, sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)

cat("\nExported files:\n")
cat("- cDC2_gained_accessibility.bed:", length(gained_2), "peaks\n")
cat("- cDC2_lost_accessibility.bed:", length(lost_2), "peaks\n")
cat("- cDC2_significant_peaks_labeled.bed: combined file\n")
export.bed(sig_sorted_2, "cDC2_significant_peaks_sorted.bed")

```

```{r}
# Get ALL results (significant + non-significant) for RNA integration
all_results_2 <- dba.report(cDC2, method=DBA_EDGER, th=1, bUsePval=FALSE)

cat("\n=== ALL cDC2 Peaks Summary ===\n")
cat("Total peaks analyzed:", length(all_results_2), "\n")
cat("Significant peaks (p<0.01):", sum(all_results_2$`p-value` < 0.01, na.rm=TRUE), "\n")
cat("Non-significant peaks:", sum(all_results_2$`p-value` >= 0.01, na.rm=TRUE), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Annotate ALL peaks with ChIPseeker
txdb_2 <- TxDb.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm39.refGene

annotated_all_2 <- annotatePeak(
  all_results_2, 
  TxDb = txdb_2,
  annoDb = "org.Mm.eg.db",
  tssRegion = c(-3000, 3000),
  verbose = TRUE
)

```

```{r}

colnames(as.data.frame(annotated_all_2))

# Convert annotated results to dataframe
peaks_all_df_2 <- as.data.frame(annotated_all_2) %>%
  mutate(
    peak_type = ifelse(Fold > 0, "Gain", "Loss"),
    log2FoldChange_ATAC = Fold
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    seqnames, start, end, width, strand,
    gene = SYMBOL,
    log2FoldChange_ATAC,
    FDR_ATAC = FDR,
    pvalue = p.value,
    peak_type,
    distanceToTSS,
    annotation,
    Conc, Conc_WT, Conc_KO
  )

```

```{r}

# Summary
cat("\n=== Annotation Summary (ALL cDC2 peaks) ===\n")
cat("Total peaks:", nrow(peaks_all_df_2), "\n")
cat("Peaks with gene annotation:", sum(!is.na(peaks_all_df_2$gene)), "\n")
cat("Peaks without gene:", sum(is.na(peaks_all_df_2$gene)), "\n")

```


```{r}
# For genes with multiple peaks, keep the one closest to TSS
peaks_for_rna_2 <- peaks_all_df_2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene) & gene != "") %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  arrange(abs(distanceToTSS)) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("\n=== Unique Genes in cDC2 ===\n")
cat("Unique genes with peaks:", nrow(peaks_for_rna_2), "\n")

write.csv(peaks_all_df_2, "cDC2_diffbind_ALL_annotated.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#all peaks, includes genes with multiple peaks)
write.csv(peaks_for_rna_2, "cDC2_diffbind_ALL_annotated_unique_genes.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#one peak per gene, for RNA integration
```


```{r}
# Also annotate just the significant peaks (for reference)
annotated_sig_2 <- annotatePeak(
  sig_sorted_2, 
  TxDb = txdb_2,
  annoDb = "org.Mm.eg.db",
  tssRegion = c(-3000, 3000),
  verbose = TRUE
)

peaks_sig_df_2 <- as.data.frame(annotated_sig_2) %>%
  mutate(
    peak_type = ifelse(Fold > 0, "Gain", "Loss"),
    log2FoldChange_ATAC = Fold
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    seqnames, start, end,
    gene = SYMBOL,
    log2FoldChange_ATAC,
    FDR_ATAC = FDR,
    pvalue = `p.value`,
    peak_type,
    distanceToTSS,
    annotation
  )

write.csv(peaks_sig_df_2, "cDC1_diffbind_significant_annotated.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
